## Runtime.IRuntimeContext.scaleRecipe() method

Scales a recipe to a target weight.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleRecipe(recipeId: RecipeId, targetWeight: Grams, options?: IRecipeScaleOptions): Result<IRuntimeScaledRecipeVersion>;
```
